name: conviso-mcp
description: Read and write Conviso Platform data (companies, projects, issues, assets, tickets, requirements, applications, scans, supply chain, AI-pentest, threat modeling) from MCP clients.
long_description: This MCP server exposes the Conviso Platform to MCP clients. It provides read tools for companies, projects, issues, assets, tickets, requirements, applications, scan histories, SBOM/supply-chain components, AI-pentest artifacts/executions and threat-model artifacts, plus write tools: a generic allowlisted mutation engine (list/describe/execute) and curated shortcuts for the most common writes (change issue status, create vulnerabilities/projects/assets/tickets, run DAST, trigger AI-pentest).

tools.name: get_companies
tools.description: Return a paginated list of companies accessible with the provided API key. Use `search` to filter by company name.

tools.name: get_company_info
tools.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific company, including plan, integrations, and branding metadata.

tools.name: get_issue
tools.description: Fetch detailed technical data for a specific vulnerability/issue. Optionally include raw request/response and vulnerable code snippets.

tools.name: get_issues
tools.description: List vulnerabilities for a company with rich filtering (project, asset, severity, status, SLA, dates, assignee) and sorting.

tools.name: get_top_vulnerabilities
tools.description: Return a summary of vulnerability counts grouped by severity for a given company (risk overview).

tools.name: get_projects
tools.description: Return a paginated list of security projects for a company, with filtering and sorting.

tools.name: get_project
tools.description: Retrieve detailed metadata for a specific project by its ID.

tools.name: get_project_types
tools.description: List the available project types (id, code, label) — source of the type_id required by create_project.

tools.name: get_project_statuses
tools.description: List the available project statuses (id, label, isInitial).

tools.name: get_asset
tools.description: Fetch information about a specific asset by its ID.

tools.name: get_assets
tools.description: Return a paginated list of assets for a company, with rich filtering and sorting.

tools.name: create_project_url
tools.description: Return a direct URL to open a project in the Conviso Platform for quick navigation.

tools.name: create_issue_url
tools.description: Return a direct URL to open a specific issue in the Conviso Platform for triage or review.

tools.name: get_mttr_over_time
tools.description: Get Mean Time To Resolution (MTTR) aggregated over a date range. Supports filtering by severities, statuses, and assets.

tools.name: get_overall_risk_score_history
tools.description: Retrieve historical overall risk scores for a company, useful for trend analysis and reporting.

tools.name: get_today_date
tools.description: Utility tool returning the current day, month and year.

tools.name: get_tickets
tools.description: List tickets for a company (paginated), with optional search and TicketSearch params.

tools.name: get_ticket
tools.description: Get a single ticket by id, including status, priority, impact and assignee.

tools.name: get_requirements
tools.description: List security requirements/checklists (playbooks) for a company, searchable by label — source of the requirement_ids used by create_project.

tools.name: get_requirement
tools.description: Get a single requirement/checklist by id.

tools.name: get_project_requirements
tools.description: List the requirements/checklists attached to a specific project.

tools.name: get_applications
tools.description: List applications for a company (id, name, url, riskScore, assetsCount), with optional name search.

tools.name: get_application
tools.description: Get a single application by id, including its linked assets.

tools.name: get_scan_histories
tools.description: List scan execution histories for a company (status, integration, durations, vulnerability counts).

tools.name: get_asset_scans_count
tools.description: Get scan coverage counts for a company (assets with scans, without scans, and which scans are considered).

tools.name: get_sbom_components
tools.description: List SBOM / supply-chain components for a company (name, version, technology, package manager, license, issues by severity).

tools.name: get_pentest_artifacts
tools.description: List AI-Pentest artifacts for a company (label, type, scheduling, latest execution).

tools.name: get_pentest_artifact
tools.description: Get a single AI-Pentest artifact by id, including scope and its executions.

tools.name: get_pentest_execution
tools.description: Get the result/status of a single AI-Pentest execution by id (status, vulnerability count, severity breakdown, retest progress).

tools.name: get_threat_model_artifacts
tools.description: List Threat Modeling artifacts for a company (label, scope, latest version).

tools.name: get_threat_model_artifact
tools.description: Get a single Threat Modeling artifact by id, including its versions (diagrams, notes, scope).

tools.name: list_mutations
tools.description: Discover the available write operations (name, description, category, destructive flag). Step 1 of the write workflow.

tools.name: describe_mutation
tools.description: Return the full input schema for a single mutation (fields, required, enum values, nested inputs) plus default return fields.

tools.name: execute_mutation
tools.description: Execute any allowlisted Conviso Platform mutation by name with a generic input object. May be destructive.

tools.name: change_issue_status
tools.description: Curated shortcut: change an issue/vulnerability status.

tools.name: create_source_code_vulnerability
tools.description: Curated shortcut: create a manual source-code (SAST-style) vulnerability on an asset.

tools.name: create_project
tools.description: Curated shortcut: create a project, optionally associating requirements (requirement_ids) and assets (asset_ids).

tools.name: create_asset
tools.description: Curated shortcut: create an asset.

tools.name: create_ticket
tools.description: Curated shortcut: open a ticket.

tools.name: run_dast
tools.description: Curated shortcut: start a Conviso DAST scan on an asset.

tools.name: trigger_pentest
tools.description: Curated shortcut: trigger an AI-Pentest execution from an existing pentest artifact.

tools.name: create_pentest_artifact
tools.description: Curated shortcut: create an AI-Pentest artifact (the scope/config a pentest runs against).
